title: justicia agria
intro: Justicia agria, also known as bitter justicia or Mexican honeysuckle, is a plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Justicia agria include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Justicia agria typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the plant's leaves, which can be used to address various health concerns.
